requirement_topic.en: Outdoor Noise Emissions for Listed Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 列名户外设备噪声排放
requirement_topic.zht: 列名戶外設備噪聲排放

summary.en: Directive 2000/14/EC is mandatory for outdoor equipment listed in its scope, which can include certain garden and construction-type power tools. It requires noise marking and conformity assessment, and some equipment categories have noise limits or notified-body involvement. This obligation is separate from general machinery safety and CE documentation.
summary.zh: 指令 2000/14/EC 对其范围内列名户外设备具有强制性，可能包括部分园林和施工类电动工具。该指令要求噪声标识和符合性评定，部分设备类别有噪声限值或公告机构参与要求。该义务独立于一般机械安全和 CE 文件。
summary.zht: 指令 2000/14/EC 對其範圍內列名戶外設備具有強制性，可能包括部分園林和施工類電動工具。該指令要求噪聲標識和符合性評定，部分設備類別有噪聲限值或公告機構參與要求。該義務獨立於一般機械安全和 CE 文件。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2000/14/EC on noise emission in the environment by equipment for use outdoors
Relevant harmonised noise measurement standards [voluntary technical route where cited]

summary.en: China GB 3883 safety evidence usually focuses on electrical and mechanical hazards and may not include EU outdoor-noise marking, guaranteed sound-power level, category classification, or notified-body path.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 3883 安全证据通常侧重电气和机械危险，可能不包含欧盟户外噪声标识、保证声功率级、设备类别划分或公告机构路径。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 3883 安全證據通常側重電氣和機械危險，可能不包含歐盟戶外噪聲標識、保證聲功率級、設備類別劃分或公告機構路徑。

standards_or_laws: China domestic noise standards where applicable

gap.en: Outdoor-use tools need category screening against Directive 2000/14/EC. If listed, the EU file must add the correct noise procedure, declared or guaranteed sound-power level, marking, and any required notified-body evidence.
gap.zh: 户外使用工具需要按指令 2000/14/EC 进行类别筛查。若属于列名设备，欧盟文件必须增加正确的噪声程序、声明或保证声功率级、标识以及任何必要的公告机构证据。
gap.zht: 戶外使用工具需要按指令 2000/14/EC 進行類別篩查。若屬於列名設備，歐盟文件必須增加正確的噪聲程序、聲明或保證聲功率級、標識以及任何必要的公告機構證據。

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for listed outdoor equipment: Directive 2000/14/EC. Noise test standards are technical routes and are not standalone mandatory legal acts.
target.zh: 列名户外设备的强制法律义务：指令 2000/14/EC。噪声测试标准是技术路径，并非独立强制法律文件。
target.zht: 列名戶外設備的強制法律義務：指令 2000/14/EC。噪聲測試標準是技術路徑，並非獨立強制法律文件。

cn.en: GB 3883 safety evidence does not automatically cover EU outdoor-noise obligations.
cn.zh: GB 3883 安全证据不会自动覆盖欧盟户外噪声义务。
cn.zht: GB 3883 安全證據不會自動覆蓋歐盟戶外噪聲義務。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Potentially non-compliant for outdoor listed equipment unless Directive 2000/14/EC screening and any required noise marking, measurement, and conformity assessment are added to the EU file.
compliance_verdict.zh: 对于列名户外设备，如未在欧盟文件中加入指令 2000/14/EC 筛查以及必要的噪声标识、测量和符合性评定，则可能不合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: 對於列名戶外設備，如未在歐盟文件中加入指令 2000/14/EC 篩查以及必要的噪聲標識、測量和符合性評定，則可能不合規。
